title: aster × tardiflorus f. vestitus
intro: Aster × tardiflorus f. vestitus, also known as the purple coneflower, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving pain. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, fight off infections, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Aster × tardiflorus f. vestitus can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
